assertions.notes: BFF emits json:'Trends' (capital T). The SPA TrendAnalysis class reads source['Trends'] (after the fix from PR #2910). Before the fix the SPA read source['Periods'] which is absent on the wire — the chart was always empty. The seeded test-data.sql has player_stats rows for 8 dates across Standard/QuickDraft formats, enough to produce at least one trend period. A Trends/Periods key mismatch would render win-rate-trend-empty instead of win-rate-trend-chart.
